title: Waystones RP
description: A resource pack that adds custom textures to KawaMood's Waystones datapack.
body:
![Waystones RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0766213454ef9f118886d724d8fc32728f29d9d2.png)
### This resource pack adds custom textures to [KawaMood's Waystones datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack) (Version 3.1 or above).
⠀  
![Comparison of a waystones GUI without and with Waystones RP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/225f92fcb25132a7a95b739f49f2e0e5dcd88cf3.png)

### Additional informations : 

- Waystones RP is only optional to use Waystones, and the datapack works without it.

- Waystones RP only works with Waystones V.3.1.0 or above (3.0.1 and below are not supported).

- When you move your mouse over certain parts of a Waystones GUI, they become clearer while they shouldn't. It is a known issue, and something I don't know how to fix. It comes from these parts being retextured items.


If you experience bugs or issues, or if you have suggestions for Waystones RP, you can report/make them on [discord](https://discord.com/invite/w8s9XWgN6v).
